description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Kodi Addon-Submitter that triggers on push events with tags matching v*. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with write-all permissions. It should check out the code, generate a distribution zip, and submit it to the official Kodi repository using the xbmc/action-kodi-addon-submitter action. Additionally, it should create a GitHub release and upload the addon zip to the release.
